Based on SpinQ's real quantum computer, Longying Zhida , a wholly-owned technology company of Huaxia Bank, cooperated with SpinQ to build a quantum neural network model to provide a basis for judgement on whether to remove ATM machines and to help commercial banks' intelligent decision-making and the digital transformation of operation and management.
### Huaxia Bank Collaborating with SpinQ to Construct Quantum AI Models for Intelligent Commercial Banking Decisions

Based on SpinQ's real quantum computer, Longying Zhida , a wholly-owned technology company of Huaxia Bank, cooperated with SpinQ to build a quantum neural network model to provide a basis for judgement on whether to remove ATM machines and to help commercial banks' intelligent decision-making and the digital transformation of operation and management.
Collaborating with SpinQ to Construct Quantum AI Models for Intelligent Commercial Banking Decisions

interaction_phrase: Quantum Computing Enables AI Applications to Embark on A Long Journey
occurrence_sentence:
### DEEPROUTE.AI
##### Quantum Computing Enables AI Applications to Embark on A Long Journey

Researchers at SpinQ have proposed a new quantum-based gradient computation method that takes advantage of the high parallelism of quantum computing to obtain the numerical gradient results of multivariate functions with only one computation, providing an efficient solution to the parameter optimisation problem.

Researchers at SpinQ have proposed a new quantum-based gradient computation method that takes advantage of the high parallelism of quantum computing to obtain the numerical gradient results of multivariate functions with only one computation, providing an efficient solution to the parameter optimisation problem.

SpinQ Technology Inc., a leading provider of full-stack quantum computing solutions, today announced that a landmark research paper in collaboration with Hubei University has been published in Quantum Information Processing, a leading peer-reviewed journal in the field of quantum information science.

The paper introduces a novel noise-resistant quantum algorithm and validates its effectiveness on SpinQ hardware, marking a significant step forward in technological innovation and industry-academia collaboration between the two companies.

SpinQ Technology Inc., a leading provider of full-stack quantum computing solutions, today announced that a landmark research paper in collaboration with Hubei University has been published in Quantum Information Processing, a leading peer-reviewed journal in the field of quantum information science.
This paper is the result of a long-term strategic collaboration between SpinQ and Hubei University, aiming to connect academic research with quantum innovation practices.

interaction_phrase: in collaboration between SpinQ and Professor Zhongbing Huang's team at Hubei University
occurrence_sentence: Developed in collaboration between SpinQ and Professor Zhongbing Huang's team at Hubei University, this algorithm aims to address key limitations of mainstream non-uniform system quantum computing (NISQ) methods, such as Variable Quantum Feature Solver (VQE) and Quantum Phase Estimation (QPE).

interaction_phrase: long-term strategic collaboration between SpinQ and Hubei University
occurrence_sentence: This paper is the result of a long-term strategic collaboration between SpinQ and Hubei University, aiming to connect academic research with quantum innovation practices.

Since formally establishing their partnership in December 2024, the two universities have built a complete ecosystem for quantum talent cultivation, including a joint teaching laboratory equipped with SpinQ desktop quantum computers.

interaction_phrase: deepen its cooperation with Hubei University
occurrence_sentence: Looking ahead, SpinQ will continue to deepen its cooperation with Hubei University and other academic partners, advance core technology research, jointly develop innovation platforms, and cultivate high-level quantum talent to promote the high-quality development of the global quantum computing industry.

interaction_phrase: funding from the National Natural Science Foundation of China
occurrence_sentence: With funding from the National Natural Science Foundation of China and the Hubei Provincial Natural Science Foundation, the WQTE algorithm provides a new framework for the practical application of quantum computing in quantum chemistry, materials simulation, and related fields.

interaction_phrase: built a complete ecosystem for quantum talent cultivation, including a joint teaching laboratory equipped with SpinQ desktop quantum computers
occurrence_sentence: Since formally establishing their partnership in December 2024, the two universities have built a complete ecosystem for quantum talent cultivation, including a joint teaching laboratory equipped with SpinQ desktop quantum computers.

interaction_phrase: SpinQ engineers also played a key role in hardware verification and technical problem-solving
occurrence_sentence: SpinQ engineers also played a key role in hardware verification and technical problem-solving, establishing a collaborative model between industry, academia, and research.

interaction_phrase: SpinQ will continue to deepen its cooperation with Hubei University
occurrence_sentence: Looking ahead, SpinQ will continue to deepen its cooperation with Hubei University and other academic partners, advance core technology research, jointly develop innovation platforms, and cultivate high-level quantum talent to promote the high-quality development of the global quantum computing industry.

interaction_phrase: With funding from the National Natural Science Foundation of China
